name: 53 By The Sea
tagline: Glass-walled waterfront dining at Kewalo Basin — panoramic ocean views and spectacular sunsets for special occasions.
talkStory: Built in the 1990s by Japanese conglomerate Suntory, 53 By The Sea was later transformed by local restaurateur Shawn Ching into the sleek glass-walled showpiece on Kewalo Basin it is today. The name comes from its address at Pier 53. This is Honolulu's premier proposal spot — request a west-facing window table and arrive 30 minutes before sunset. The lounge menu offers the same jaw-dropping ocean views at half the dining room price.
